$schema_note: Registry of all modules — current and future. Every module has a feature flag in settings; frontend and backend both organize code by these module keys.

conventions.feature_flag: settings key modules.<key>.enabled — disabled modules hide routes (404) and UI entries

core_modules.name: Authentication
core_modules.summary: OSAS SSO for students (active-status check), local credentials for staff, JWT access + rotating refresh, lockout, reset, optional admin OTP, device tracking.

core_modules.name: Student Management
core_modules.summary: OSAS-synced profiles (ID, program, year, section, status, photo) + local data (adviser, preferences); CSV import for edge cases; status lifecycle.

core_modules.name: Faculty Management
core_modules.summary: Faculty records, employment info, roles, assigned classes/events/sections/rooms, attendance permissions.

core_modules.name: Subject Management
core_modules.summary: Subject code, title, units, lecture/lab type, instructor, semester, schedule, room.

core_modules.name: Section Management
core_modules.summary: Sections per course/year, capacity, adviser assignment.

core_modules.name: Scheduling & Calendar
core_modules.summary: Weekly schedules (importable from OSAS), calendar exceptions: holidays, suspensions, makeup classes, special events; session generation respects exceptions.

core_modules.name: QR Attendance
core_modules.summary: Session lifecycle, dynamic QR regenerating every 60s (encrypted, time-limited), static QR option for events, scanner, server-side validation, duplicate prevention, manual fallback.

core_modules.name: Attendance Monitoring
core_modules.summary: Live roster (students inside room, late list, percentages), today's classes/events, weekly/monthly statistics, history, overrides, correction workflow.

core_modules.name: Reports
core_modules.summary: Daily/weekly/monthly/semester reports, per student/subject/instructor; CSV, Excel (XLSX), PDF export.

core_modules.name: Dashboard
core_modules.summary: Role-shaped widgets and charts via a single role-aware endpoint.

core_modules.name: Notifications
core_modules.summary: In-app realtime (Socket.IO) + transactional email; per-user preferences and read state.

core_modules.name: Settings
core_modules.summary: Terms, thresholds, QR rotation interval, static-QR allowance, OSAS sync config, module flags, maintenance banner.

core_modules.name: OSAS Integration
core_modules.summary: Server-to-server client for the university OSAS API: SSO verification, profile sync, schedule import, calendar exception sync, nightly jobs, health/status endpoint, sync logs.

core_modules.name: Audit & Logs
core_modules.summary: Audit logs (before/after, actor, IP), activity logs, login logs, attendance logs, OSAS sync logs.

future_modules.name: Student Profile (extended)
future_modules.summary: Extended profile beyond OSAS fields; documents; emergency contacts.

future_modules.name: Digital ID
future_modules.summary: Per-student QR identity card enabling kiosk scan mode (faculty scans students).

future_modules.name: Grades
future_modules.summary: Grade encoding, viewing, and term summaries.

future_modules.name: Events
future_modules.summary: Event creation with QR attendance reuse (event sessions).

extension_rules: New modules follow the same feature-folder pattern on both tiers and register their own routes under /api/v1/<key>
New modules ship disabled behind their feature flag until accepted in staging
Shared zod schemas/types go in packages/shared; modules never import from another module's internals — only via service interfaces
Database changes arrive as Prisma migrations; destructive migrations require a backup checkpoint
